name: Punch-Out!!
description: Punch-Out!! is a boxing game centered around Little Mac, a small and inexperienced boxer, as he attempts to climb the ranks of the World Video Boxing Association (WVBA). The core gameplay loop involves facing a series of increasingly challenging, uniquely designed opponents in one-on-one matches. Each opponent possesses distinct fighting styles, strengths, weaknesses, and tells. Mac can dodge, block, and punch high or low, and eventually learn powerful special attacks. Gameplay focuses on pattern recognition and exploiting opponent vulnerabilities to achieve knockouts. The game culminates in a championship match against Mike Tyson (or Mr. Dream depending on the version). The game uses a perspective of looking from behind Little Mac. A wireframe representation of Mac shows how much damage is being taken. Power punches are available when the star meter is filled. Star power can be obtained by hitting an opponent when they are vulnerable or performing a specific action. Opponents exhibit unique taunts, stances, and animations that provide clues about their next move. The game features a referee who manages the rounds and issues warnings or disqualifications. A second character appears who offers clues during the fight about the current opponent.
